personal.name: Pasindu Sewmuthu
personal.title: AI Engineer | Machine Learning Operations & System Researcher
personal.tagline: Architecting intelligent, scalable, and human-centered AI systems that solve real-world complexities.
personal.cv_url: /assets/P.S. Abewickrama Singhe - AI Engineer Intern - CV.pdf

about.summary: I am a BSc. (Hons) in Computer Science and Technology undergraduate with a strong focus on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Computer Vision. My academic and project work centers on real-time AI systems, multimodal learning, and human-centered AI applications. I am especially interested in building scalable, low-latency AI solutions that integrate vision, speech, and language understanding.
about.goals: I actively pursue research-oriented development, hands-on system design, and industry-aligned engineering practices. My long-term goal is to work as an AI Engineer at a world-class technology company while contributing meaningful research and open-source systems.

projects.title: EmoSign – Emotion-Aware Bidirectional Sign Language Translation
projects.description: A real-time, AI-powered, bidirectional sign language translation system that supports sign-to-text/speech and speech-to-sign translation while preserving emotional context.
highlights: Real-time sign language recognition and translation
Emotion-aware text generation and speech synthesis

projects.title: CIFAR-10 Vehicle Image Classification
projects.description: An image classification system built using custom CNNs and transfer learning (MobileNetV2) to classify vehicle-related categories from the CIFAR-10 dataset.
highlights: Custom CNN and MobileNetV2 transfer learning

projects.title: Django Blog Web Application
projects.description: A feature-rich blog platform developed using Django and the MVT architecture, supporting content management and user interaction.

projects.title: Polynomial Representation Using Linked Lists
projects.description: An implementation of polynomial operations such as addition and subtraction using linked lists in C, demonstrating strong fundamentals in data structures.

experience.description: Worked as a freelance web scraping developer, delivering customized data extraction solutions for international clients.
achievements: Designed automated web scraping solutions using Python
Handled complex dynamic content and rate limits
Cleaned and validated datasets in various formats

experience.description: Pre-Internship programme focusing on full-stack system development.

achievements: Build an AI That Sees: Image Recognition – Google Developer Groups
